hooks.command: FILE=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if [[ -z "$FILE" ]]; then exit 0; fi; if [[ $FILE == *.ts || $FILE == *.tsx || $FILE == *.css || $FILE == *.md ]]; then pnpm --dir /Users/evan/Desktop/Personal/Projects/papercraft-client prettier --write "$FILE" 2>&1; elif [[ $FILE == *.rs ]]; then rustfmt "$FILE" 2>&1; fi

CMD=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | jq -r '.command // empty'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'push --force|reset --hard|clean -f|branch -D'; then echo 'Blocked destructive git command. Ask the user first.' >&2; exit 2; fi
